title: How to notify someone when board created via template automation?
excerpt:
Hi - trying to have a notification going out to someone about a new board having been created via a automation using a board template but can’t seem to work this out. Any ideas? 
Have tried the When Item Created and When…

posts.author: pdotc (Peter Carlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - trying to have a notification going out to someone about a new board having been created via a automation using a board template but can’t seem to work this out. Any ideas?

Have tried the When Item Created and When Item moved to this board without luck… Thanks

posts.author: pdotc (Peter Carlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: So basically - can you set automations of any kind when creating boards from templates? Can you assign a specific person as a owner of the board or how does this work?
